caption: The neem tree (Azadirachta indica) is a fast-growing, drought-resistant evergreen native to the Indian subcontinent. Known as India's "village pharmacy", it is prized for its high resilience, deep root systems, and incredible adaptability across a variety of soils.
Planted a beautiful Gulmohar outside my office! 🌺 My flight to Pune is now offset.
This banyan will grow to offset 28kg CO2 every year. Small acts, big impact 💚
Fruit + carbon offset — what a deal! 🥭 Mango tree planted in our building terrace garden.
